• Dynamic text replacement in a C++ rant meme generator
  • Real-time input field updates bolded C++ references
  • Minimal CSS styling with preview area for the rant text
    inputField.addEventListener('input', (event) => {
        targets.forEach(element => element.textContent = newValue || "[empty]");

This web application lets users dynamically replace all instances of "C++" in a Linus Torvalds rant with custom text. The input field updates in real-time, and the CSS styles the replaced text with bold formatting and a subtle color shift for visibility. The layout includes a preview area with a distinct background to display the modified rant.
